## How To Change A Model

```bash
# 1. Edit openclaw.json ONLY
vim ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json

# 2. Validate
jq empty ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json && echo OK

# 3. Regenerate this file
python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/generate-agent-matrix.py

# 4. Commit both files
git add openclaw.json GAIA-OS-AGENT-MATRIX.md
git commit -m "fix(model): {agent} έΗΤ {new-model}"
```
